description: Encode neural network architecture, experiment lifecycle, and autonomous research loops as SpacetimeDB transactional state — inspired by karpathy/autoresearch methodology

specs.description: Create a network config and retrieve it
specs.given: The neural-lab module is published and no configs exist
specs.when: A reducer call creates a NetworkConfig with n_layer=12, n_head=6, n_embd=768, window_pattern='SSSL'
specs.then: The config is persisted with status='candidate', a generated UUID id, parent_id='', and created_at timestamp

specs.when: A new config 'B' is created with parent_id='cfg-001' and n_embd increased to 1024
specs.then: Config 'B' has parent_id='cfg-001' and all other fields copied from 'A' except n_embd=1024

specs.when: experiment_create is called with config_id='cfg-001', hypothesis='increase width', mutation_diff='{"n_embd": [768, 1024]}'
specs.then: An Experiment row is inserted with status='queued', the config_id linked, and baseline_bpb copied from the parent config's frontier

specs.given: An Experiment exists with status='training', baseline_bpb='1.42'
specs.when: experiment_complete is called with val_bpb='1.38' (improvement of 0.04)
specs.then: Status is set to 'kept', improvement_bpb='0.04', and ResearchFrontier is updated with this experiment as best

specs.given: An Experiment exists with status='training', baseline_bpb='1.42'
specs.when: experiment_complete is called with val_bpb='1.45' (regression of -0.03)
specs.then: Status is set to 'discarded', improvement_bpb='-0.03', and ResearchFrontier is NOT updated

specs.given: ResearchFrontier has best_config_id='cfg-001' and fewer than MIN_QUEUE_DEPTH experiments are queued
specs.then: New Experiment rows are inserted with status='queued', each with a different deterministic mutation strategy, and config variants are created with parent_id='cfg-001'

specs.given: Two experiments completed for lineage 'gpt-small': exp-A with val_bpb='1.42' (kept) and exp-B with val_bpb='1.38' (kept)
specs.then: ResearchFrontier for 'gpt-small' shows best_val_bpb='1.38', best_experiment_id=exp-B, total_kept=2

specs.description: Experiment failure is recorded without affecting frontier
specs.when: experiment_fail is called with error_message='OOM on GPU node'
specs.then: Status is set to 'failed', error_message is stored, ResearchFrontier is unchanged, and the experiment does not count toward total_kept or total_discarded

specs.description: Stale experiment cleanup reclaims timed-out jobs
specs.given: An Experiment with status='training' has wall_time exceeding 2x time_budget_secs
specs.then: The experiment status is set to 'failed' with error_message='timeout: exceeded 2x time budget'

specs.description: First experiment in a lineage has no baseline
specs.then: The experiment is always 'kept' (no baseline to compare against), a new ResearchFrontier is created with best_val_bpb='1.50'

specs.description: hex-nexus dispatches queued experiments to GPU fleet
specs.given: hex-nexus is subscribed to the Experiment table via WebSocket
specs.when: research_loop_tick() inserts an Experiment with status='queued'
specs.then: hex-nexus receives the subscription event, selects an available GPU node from fleet-state, and calls experiment_start reducer with the gpu_node_id

specs.description: REST API exposes frontier and experiment history
specs.given: neural-lab module has experiments and a frontier
specs.then: Response includes best_config (full NetworkConfig), best_val_bpb, recent experiments (last 20), and total_experiments/kept/discarded counts

specs.description: CLI lists experiments with keep/discard verdicts
specs.when: hex neural-lab experiments --lineage gpt-small is run
specs.then: Output shows a table with columns: id, hypothesis, val_bpb, improvement, status (kept/discarded/failed), wall_time, gpu_node

specs.when: config_create is called with n_layer=0 or n_embd=0 or vocab_size < 256
specs.then: The reducer rejects the config with an error — no row is inserted

specs.description: Mutation strategy table tracks which strategies produce improvements
specs.when: mutation_strategy_update() fires and 'widen' has produced 5 kept / 2 discarded while 'deepen' has 1 kept / 6 discarded
specs.then: The 'widen' strategy gets higher selection_weight than 'deepen', and future research_loop_tick() calls prefer 'widen'
